77.reason: [Here, 'p' may be uninitialized when head != NULL but no new node has been assigned to 'p' yet, leading to undefined behavior.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.14285714285714285 , reason:  [p is uninitialized when head != NULL and same==0 on first insertion after head. This leads to undefined behavior (writing to random memory).]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.16666666666666666 , reason:  [Here, 'p' was last used when head was created, but in subsequent iterations, 'p' is not maintained as the tail. So p may be uninitialized or pointing to arbitrary location, causing segmentation fault or memory corruption.]

46.reason: [This reads next character without checking for EOF, which can lead to undefined behavior if file ends inside this loop. Also, after reading EOF, tp becomes indeterminate.]
